items.title: someone just told me about this take* on CUA this is one of those gell mann moments for m…
items.title_zh: 有人刚刚告诉我关于 CUA 的这件事*，这是我的盖尔曼时刻之一……
items.description: someone just told me about this take* on CUA this is one of those gell mann moments for me lol. i've been watching computer use since World of Bits (Shi, fan, karpathy, hernandez & liang 2017). we were the first technical pod to interview…
items.description_zh: 有人刚刚告诉我关于 CUA 的这个看法*，这对我来说是 Gell mann 的时刻之一，哈哈。自 World of Bits 以来，我一直在关注计算机的使用（Shi, fan, karpathy, Hernandez & liang 2017）。我们是第一个接受采访的技术团队……

items.title: Gemini Spark is headed to more Ultra subscribers around the world* plus 4 new features: 1…
items.title_zh: Gemini Spark 将吸引全球更多 Ultra 订阅者* 以及 4 项新功能：1...
items.description: Gemini Spark is headed to more Ultra subscribers around the world* plus 4 new features: 1) Spark can open and edit Google Docs, acting on feedback from last week 2) It can read comments in Google Sheets & Slides, so critical info isn't mis…
items.description_zh: Gemini Spark 正在向全球更多的 Ultra 订阅者* 开放，此外还有 4 项新功能：1) Spark 可以打开和编辑 Google 文档，根据上周的反馈进行操作 2) 它可以阅读 Google 表格和幻灯片中的评论，因此重要信息不会丢失……

items.title: We just released our first-ever Gemini Southeast Asia Report (below), 3 insights: 1/ Acti…
items.title_zh: 我们刚刚发布了第一份双子座东南亚报告（如下），3 个见解：1/ Acti...
items.description: We just released our first-ever Gemini Southeast Asia Report (below), 3 insights: 1/ Active users more than doubled in the last year 2/ 70% of prompts are submitted in native languages 3/ 40% of prompts only use voice, image, or video Gemi…
items.description_zh: 我们刚刚发布了第一份 Gemini 东南亚报告（如下），3 个见解： 1/ 去年活跃用户增加了一倍以上 2/ 70% 的提示以母语提交 3/ 40% 的提示仅使用语音、图像或视频 Gemi...

items.title: Something I have been thinking about: in the past, the best engineers I knew spent a lot…
items.title_zh: 我一直在思考的事情是：过去，我认识的最好的工程师花了很多……
items.description: Something I have been thinking about: in the past, the best engineers I knew spent a lot of time automating their work in various ways. Better vim/emacs automations, writing lint rules to catch repeat code issues, building up a suite of e2…
items.description_zh: 我一直在思考的事情是：过去，我认识的最好的工程师花了很多时间以各种方式自动化他们的工作。更好的 vim/emacs 自动化，编写 lint 规则来捕获重复代码问题，构建一套 e2…

items.title: We've had no 5h limit in Codex plus and pro for a few days.
items.title_zh: 几天来，Codex plus 和 pro 中没有 5 小时的限制。
items.description: We've had no 5h limit in Codex plus and pro for a few days. Do you think it is better or are you finding it difficult to manage the usage included in the weekly limit effectively? If we were to make this different, what should it look like…
items.description_zh: 几天来，Codex plus 和 pro 中没有 5 小时的限制。您认为有效管理每周限制中包含的使用量更好吗？还是您发现很难？如果我们要让它变得不同，它应该是什么样子......

items.title: On file deletions.
items.description: On file deletions. We’ve investigated a handful of reports where GPT-5.6 unexpectedly deleted files. What we have found is that this most commonly occurs when: - Full access mode is enabled and codex is run without sandboxing protections,…
items.description_zh: 关于文件删除。我们调查了一些 GPT-5.6 意外删除文件的报告。我们发现，这种情况最常发生在以下情况： - 启用完全访问模式并且 Codex 在没有沙箱保护的情况下运行，...

items.title: Now that we merged ChatGPT and Codex, what should we merge next?
items.title_zh: 既然我们合并了 ChatGPT 和 Codex，接下来我们应该合并什么？
items.description: Now that we merged ChatGPT and Codex, what should we merge next? What's the double or nothing move.
items.description_zh: 既然我们合并了 ChatGPT 和 Codex，接下来我们应该合并什么？什么是双或无动。

items.title: btw, i have used ai to refine ideas and from time to time, some of the standard AI-isms l…
items.title_zh: 顺便说一句，我使用人工智能来提炼想法，并且时不时地，一些标准的人工智能主义...
items.description: btw, i have used ai to refine ideas and from time to time, some of the standard AI-isms leak into my writing. have since moved to consciously using ai mainly during the brainstorming phase and keeping final writing human.
items.description_zh: 顺便说一句，我使用人工智能来提炼想法，并且时不时地，一些标准的人工智能主义会渗入我的写作中。此后主要在头脑风暴阶段有意识地使用人工智能，并保持最终写作的人性化。

meta.bio: Sr Director, AI at Meta; Prev: Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana.
